name: Bombermon

signature_move.name: Combo Blast
signature_move.description: Attaches multipleBBbombs to a target and sets off a chain explosion.

description: The self-proclaimed " Explosive Artist " who loves explosions more than anything else. Its sole guiding principle is how beautifully the bombs it creates will detonate, and it has no feelings towards the damage caused by their explosions. It is capable of generating its standalone " BB " bombs by snapping the fingers on its left hand. The BBs receive Bombermon's instructions, move to the target of the explosion, attach themselves to the target, and then detonate. The explosive power of the BBs varies depending on Bombermon's emotions; the higher its spirits are, the more powerful they will be. During battle, it uses its " Combo Blast ", in which it attaches multiple BBs to a target and sets off a chain explosion, and its " Limit Explosion ", in which it detonates a single BB , for different purposes. " Combo Blast " is not very powerful, but has a short detonation time and is great for when a quick response is needed, and " Limit Explosion " takes a certain amount of time to detonate, but is extremely explosive.
